pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 17.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+ and often requires explicit dependency; migrating to Jakarta namespace is standard for modern stacks, though strictly speaking javax.annotation-api still compiles if present, this is a migration intent.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the <release> flag for Java 17 or may fail to compile against JDK 17 toolchains.
